title: Bare Bones Bioms'o'plenty
description: this texture pack adds bare bones to bioms'o'plenty
body:
this is a _Recource Pack_ that adds **Bare Bones** to **Bioms'o'Plenty**

#                   75% Done :D

_Working_ on **[Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)** compatibility

**[Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)** and **[Bioms'o'Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)** is required!!!!
